column4: Steps
Go to /auth/login
Click Demo Login or enter demo credentials
Go to /auth/signup
Try accessing /cockpit/dashboard without login — should redirect to login
Click Exit Cockpit from topbar — should return to landing page
Navigate to /cockpit/dashboard
Click each sidebar link — all should load without errors
Check topbar — should show SExC balance in green
Click wallet badge — should navigate to E-Shares page
Verify Exit Cockpit button visible and wallet badge doesn't overlap
Go to /cockpit/my-e-assets/my-e-shares
Verify all 8 demo brands: Urban Signal, Tech Insights, Fitness Revolution, Neon Beats, Wanderlust Eats, CodeCraft, Velvet Thread, The Daily Take
Watch prices — should fluctuate up/down with green/red indicators
Each card: name, handle, platform, price, market cap, 24h change
Click brand → Buy tab → Enter share amount → Submit
Click brand you own → Sell tab → Enter amount → Submit
Click Portfolio tab — should show holdings with unrealized P&L
Click Wallet tab — should show balance card
Wallet tab → Enter amount ($10+) → Click Deposit → Balance updates
Wallet tab → Enter amount → See 10% fee preview → Click Withdraw
Click $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 buttons — amount field populates
Wallet tab → Scroll down → Should show transaction history
Click List Brand tab → Form should load for creating new brand
Click brand name → Should navigate to /cockpit/my-e-assets/my-e-shares/brand/[id]
Go to /cockpit/my-e-assets/my-feeds
Click Add Feed → Fill form → Submit
New feed should appear with platform icon, handle, metrics
Click a feed card — should highlight and show details
Select feed → Click delete/remove → Feed disappears
Add content to a feed → Should appear in content list
Navigate to /cockpit/my-e-assets/my-feeds/automation
Navigate to /cockpit/my-e-assets/my-feeds/scheduler
Go to /cockpit/trading-post
Go to /cockpit/trading-post/buy
Go to /cockpit/trading-post/sell
Go to /founder
Go to /founder/instruments
Go to /founder/logs
Go to /founder/market
Go to /founder/treasury
Go to / (root)
Go to /privacy
Go to /exchange
Go to /cockpit/comms
Go to /cockpit/operations
Go to /cockpit/systems
Go to /cockpit/about
Open DevTools Console — check for red errors on each page
Resize browser to ~375px width — layouts shouldn't break
All pages should use the dark theme consistently
Verify breadcrumbs/back navigation work on sub-pages
Refresh page — E-Shares data, wallet balance, feeds should persist
Clear localStorage → Refresh → Demo data should seed automatically
